description: Letter from Yūsuf b. Q[...] al-[...]ān to Abū l-Faḍl [ʿAṭallāh?] b. Yaʿqūb. In Judaeo-Arabic. Very rudimentary hand. The writer is in distress for some reason, and he seems to have run out of his money thanks to Ibn Asad, and he thanks the addressee for his prior help. The details of his story are difficult to decipher. Verso was reused for accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, but these are too faded to read.
